summary: Archon's `when:` parser supports simple equality (`$node.output == 'value'`), same-operator chains (`$a == 'x' && $b == 'y'`), but NOT parentheses or mixed `&&`/`||`. CI enforces this via `dark-factory/scripts/check_workflow_when.py` (called from the "Validate Archon workflow YAML" step in `.github/workflows/ci.yml`). Adding `(` `)` or mixing `&&` with `||` will fail CI.
